title: lamium montanum
intro: Lamium montanum, also known as mountain lamium, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and distinctive spotted leaves. The medicinal properties of Lamium montanum include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Lamium montanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
